Header file for initializing the Power Management IC (PMIC) in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
The code is a simple C header file that declares a function prototype for [`pmic_init`](<#pmic_init>). The `#pragma once` directive ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The function [`pmic_init`](<#pmic_init>) is likely intended to initialize a Power Management Integrated Circuit (PMIC), although the specific implementation details are not provided in this header file.
